title: gufg MTR
description: The modpack with all mods & resource packs required for gufg's MTR server
body:
This is the modpack required to properly play on gufg's MTR server, now on Modrinth!

Don't know what gufg's MTR server is? Well, gufg's MTR server is a Minecraft server that, at its core, is based around the Minecraft Transit Railway mod (MTR). This mod is very heavily expanded upon by its community, and many of those expansions can be found on the server. So, this modpack includes everything required to run every function on the server from its mods to resource packs. If you would like to learn more about the server or check it out yourself, you can find more info in our Discord (linked).
